entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a climate-resilient crop capable of atmospheric nitrogen fixation

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand and adapt to climate variations

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for plants

entities.name: NITROGENOUS FERTILIZER
entities.description: Chemical substances providing nitrogen to crops, whose demand is increasing globally

entities.name: MESORHIZOBIUM CICERI
entities.description: A symbiotic bacterium that enables nitrogen fixation in chickpea

entities.name: ROOT NODULATION
entities.description: The formation of specialized root structures for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Agronomic characteristics that influence the overall production and yield of the crop

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to extract genotypic data from the entire genome

entities.name: SINGLE-NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Genetic variations at a single position in a DNA sequence used as markers

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: The process of linking genetic markers to phenotypic traits

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci in a population

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The statistical link between a genetic marker and a specific trait

entities.name: BLINK
entities.description: A specific association mapping model used to identify MTAs

entities.name: FARMCPU
entities.description: A specific association mapping model used to identify MTAs

entities.name: AUXINS ENCODING GENES
entities.description: Genes responsible for encoding auxins, associated with nodulation

entities.name: NOD FACTOR TRANSPORTER GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the transport of nod factors, associated with nodulation

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genetic markers to select for desired traits
